description: Company negotiation playbook — acceptable ranges for common clause types.

ip.standard: Vendor retains all pre-existing IP; only custom work-for-hire transfers
ip.acceptable_range: Vendor grants broad licence for deliverables; full assignment only for bespoke work

red_flags: payment on delivery with no review period

termination.standard: 30-day notice for convenience; 30-day cure period for breach

data.standard: GDPR Art. 28 DPA with SCCs for international transfers
data.acceptable_range: DPA must be present for any EU personal data

governing_law.acceptable_range: Governing law of either party's home jurisdiction
red_flags: exclusive foreign jurisdiction with no dispute resolution

auto_renewal.standard: 30-day written notice to cancel before renewal
red_flags: automatic renewal with no notice requirement

sla.standard: 99.9% monthly uptime; service credits of 10% per 1% downtime below SLA
sla.acceptable_range: 99.5% minimum uptime with any credit mechanism

audit.standard: Annual right to audit security controls with 30-day notice
audit.acceptable_range: Right to request SOC 2 reports; direct audit with 30 days notice
red_flags: audit costs borne entirely by auditing party
